[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A cartoon-style close-up shows a pink-haired character with a small smiling face, one visible eye, and a raised hand holding a hand-drawn-looking pose.

The main subject is a stylized character head and upper shoulder area, drawn with simple shading and thick outlines. The character has light pink hair with straight bangs and two side sections, pale skin, and a cute, closed-mouth smile. One eye is visible, drawn as a large, glossy blue eye with a dark upper lid and light highlights; the eyelashes are minimal and the expression is calm. The character’s cheeks have small pink blush marks, and there are a couple of faint blush or shading marks under the eye area. A hand or arm extends from the right side of the image toward the character’s face, and a small star shape appears near the raised hand.

The setting appears to be a plain, minimal illustrated background with no clear outdoor or indoor environment; the image looks like a cropped animation or avatar-style drawing. The background includes muted colors and a few indistinct shapes, but no clear location details are visible. The lighting is flat and uniform, consistent with a digital illustration.

No important visible text detected.

This image shows a close-up cartoon portrait of a character with pink hair and a smiling expression, drawn in a clean anime-like style. A star-shaped accent and a raised hand near the face are visible, with the rest of the background kept vague and minimal.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
